headline: US SEC settles FOIA lawsuit with Coinbase over lost messages, WSJ op-ed says
summary: Coinbase has settled a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit against the U.S. Securities ‌and Exchange Commission over records it sought ‌from the agency, the cryptocurrency exchange's chief legal officer, Paul Grewal, ​said in a Wall Street Journal op-ed on Wednesday.  Grewal said the agency, which polices corporate record-keeping, had lost text messages between former Chair Gary Gensler and other ‌officials after a process ⁠the SEC said "automatically wiped" certain data.

content.title: US SEC settles FOIA lawsuit with Coinbase over lost messages, WSJ op-ed says
content.summary: Coinbase has settled a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit against the U.S. Securities ‌and Exchange Commission over records it sought ‌from the agency, the cryptocurrency exchange's chief legal officer, Paul Grewal, ​said in a Wall Street Journal op-ed on Wednesday.  Grewal said the agency, which polices corporate record-keeping, had lost text messages between former Chair Gary Gensler and other ‌officials after a process ⁠the SEC said "automatically wiped" certain data.

thumbnail.caption: FILE PHOTO: Illustration shows Coinbase logo

headline: XRP Holders Cheer as Bessent Says Major Crypto Bill ‘On the 1-Yard Line’
summary: Treasury Secretary Bessent just told the Senate it is one play away from putting XRP's legal status to rest for good, but the vote math is razor-thin and the clock runs out in two weeks.

content.title: XRP Holders Cheer as Bessent Says Major Crypto Bill ‘On the 1-Yard Line’
content.summary: Treasury Secretary Bessent just told the Senate it is one play away from putting XRP's legal status to rest for good, but the vote math is razor-thin and the clock runs out in two weeks.

headline: Coinbase, Circle shares dip after new coverage at Raymond James
summary: Investing.com -- Shares in Coinbase and USDC issuer Circle Internet Group dipped Wednesday after Raymond James initiated coverage of the stocks with Market Perform ratings, pointing out balanced risk-reward profiles for both digital asset companies amid a challenging crypto trading environment. The broker set a fair value of $158 for Coinbase and $70 for Circle.

content.title: Coinbase, Circle shares dip after new coverage at Raymond James
content.summary: Investing.com -- Shares in Coinbase and USDC issuer Circle Internet Group dipped Wednesday after Raymond James initiated coverage of the stocks with Market Perform ratings, pointing out balanced risk-reward profiles for both digital asset companies amid a challenging crypto trading environment. The broker set a fair value of $158 for Coinbase and $70 for Circle.

headline: Coinbase Global (COIN) Is Up 8.9% After Leadership Shift And Tokenization Push Amid CLARITY Optimism – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Earlier in July 2026, Coinbase Global announced that Chief Legal Officer and Secretary Paul Grewal will step down on July 31, 2026, with Vice President, Legal Molly Abraham expected to assume the roles of General Counsel and Secretary, while the company advances plans in Canada to broaden its platform into an “Everything Exchange” including tokenized stocks for non‑U.S. customers. At the same time, growing momentum behind the CLARITY Act and wider digital asset regulation has improved...
